name: NN_00_Global_Error_Handler
description: Centralized error handler - receives errors from all workflows

name: NN_02_Message_Parser
description: Parses incoming Telegram messages, validates and sanitizes input

name: NN_03_AI_Agent
description: AI Agent with Groq (llama-3.3-70b-versatile) for booking responses

name: NN_04_Telegram_Sender
description: Sends booking confirmations and responses via Telegram

name: NN_01_Booking_Gateway
description: Main entry point - orchestrates NN_02 → NN_03 → NN_04 flow
